title: cytisus grandiflorus subsp. grandiflorus
intro: Cytisus grandiflorus subsp. grandiflorus, also known as the large yellow rattle, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Cytisus grandiflorus subsp. grandiflorus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in infusions and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
